differentials.name: Myxoma
differentials.raw: Myxoma (with almost 50% the most common primary cardiac tumor; 25% of all cardiac tumors)

differentials.name: Papillary fibroelastoma
differentials.raw: Papillary fibroelastoma (10% of all primary cardiac tumors; with 75% most common valvular tumor)

context: ◊  More common than malignant neoplasms √  localized bulge of left cardiac contour √  curvilinear / spotty calcifications (resembling myocardial aneurysm) Cx:  may rupture into cardiac chamber / pericardium
